textByHash.4fcddb16819adfd4cd49341317bebdf3ec8bce65: Are you in need of some runes?
textByHash.46620ae588722dcada083e842571f666487ebcf8: If she needs me to get involved, then no doubt this is something well beyond your people and probably highly dangerous.
textByHash.1a45012b066e4b7ab15ecf14de683b86eb620d31: But I suppose if she's okay with that... Go on then, let's have a look.
textByHash.82c86e3f3706c8c414b20cc0538092a7198783ad: Then you'd better go and find them.
textByHash.7b8a4f75cb6e7d6b66e13d98ff12d765ac44845f: How in the... Where did you get these?
textByHash.960da51f22ebd19e98f67c1f7c35516378e2c357: Actually, on second thoughts, I'm not sure I want to know.
textByHash.886ffbb152d15c95bf4dd1bc6a992bd382bea12c: There. Now take them to the blacksmith. Tell him they've been enchanted to react to naguanil magic and they need some finishing touches.
textByHash.b519b24f658c4f926f29b0b4885546be762d1f50: A type of magic your people have forgotten, alongside many other things. I don't have time to catch you up on the history of the word though, so you'll need to learn more somewhere else.
textByHash.52e2f99a4fc2be023f5d9c3bcb3187ad1467c9be: And I already attuned your talismans. Take them to the blacksmith. Tell him they've been enchanted to react to naguanil magic and they need some finishing touches.
textByHash.99f0514bec606c694884d42e4de01da2f3844939: Well luckily for you, I expected this might happen.
textByHash.fceba4b646ae193253e45b8f76bdf4cdd6deea0f: Make some room and I'll get you sorted out.
textByHash.b524f07563cc7c6f16827a33612f9d9cb8e3fdb0: That is not the kind of information I intend to give to a human.
textByHash.a3e6ef1723d97f0fa008c5331549c8411725fadc: Because before the Varlamorians decided to open their lands up to visitors, Cam Torum was the sole supplier of runes to the entire region.
textByHash.8acbbe26975a131ccbc592a126fba84a0c09e21e: A fact I'm all too aware of, especially given the impact it is having on my prices.
textByHash.8ac6a7c93331daa640bdd06885c33c601339c8c3: Nevertheless, there is still a benefit to having a source of runes closer to home, and I do not intend to share any information on that source.
textByHash.7da56d33bcec2b1880d9baa384b0b8b78284a027: Now, are you in need of some runes?
textByHash.851a339561d85467c655bb659a0a975c60f3f2f8: You display the typical arrogance of a human. I am a Dwarf of Cam Torum. My people have mastered Smithing and Magic in equal measure.
textByHash.72761a322db4a177fe4914c108851dd0b0970c4b: That little trinket of yours may well work wonders on a lesser mind, but you will find it to be of little use here.
textByHash.4518c6d055849f321d53f4d81808ec7ec2b647dd: Then we have nothing more to discuss.
